# Old Man Warcraft support guide

Thanks for helping us keep Old Man Warcraft running smoothly.

This GitHub repository is primarily used for **public, reproducible reports**:

- gameplay bugs
- disconnects, crash loops, and realm outages
- website / connection issues that affect multiple players
- suggestions and feature requests

## Use GitHub issues when

- you can describe the problem clearly
- another player or staff member could reproduce it
- the report does **not** require private account details
- screenshots, clips, or public references can help explain it

Before opening a new issue, please search existing issues first and add your details to an existing report if it matches.

## Use the support center when

Please use [oldmanwarcraft.com/support](https://oldmanwarcraft.com/support) for anything that includes sensitive or account-specific information, such as:

- account access or password help
- donations, shop, or billing questions
- appeals or staff-sensitive matters
- anything involving your email, IP, payment details, or personal information

## Use Discord when

Join the community at [oldmanwarcraft.com/discord](https://oldmanwarcraft.com/discord) for:

- quick triage
- “is anyone else seeing this?” checks
- follow-up discussion after you have opened an issue

## What makes a good bug report?

Helpful reports usually include:

- the character name involved
- the zone, dungeon, battleground, or system affected
- exact steps to reproduce the problem
- what happened vs. what should have happened
- the approximate date and time
- screenshots, video clips, or relevant links

## Please do not post

- passwords
- email addresses
- IP addresses
- payment details
- any other personal or private account information

If a report needs those details, move it to the support center instead.
